allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rus=[b['name'] for b in d if 'ru' in b['name'].lower\(\) or 'syn' in b['name'].lower\(\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(rus[:20]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rus=[b['name'] for b in d if b['name'].startswith\('ru'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(rus[:30]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{r['full_name']} \({r['language']}\) - {r['description'][:80] if r['description'] else ''}\\"\) for r in d.get\('items',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('items',[]\); print\('count:', len\(items\)\); [print\(f\\"  {r['full_name']} - {r.get\('description',''\)[:80] if r.get\('description'\) else ''}\\"\) for r in items[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ts=d.get\('translations',[]\); rus=[t for t in ts if 'rus' in t.get\('language',''\).lower\(\) or 'ru' == t.get\('language',''\).lower\(\)]; print\('count:', len\(rus\)\); [print\(f\\"  {t.get\('id'\)} | {t.get\('name',''\)} | {t.get\('language'\)} | {t.get\('englishName',''\)}\\"\) for t in rus[:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)[:2000]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); books=d.get\('books',[]\); print\('count:', len\(books\)\); [print\(f\\"  {b['id']:6} {b.get\('order'\):>3}  {b['commonName']:<20} chapters={b['numberOfChapters']}\\"\) for b in books[:80]]")
